title: Information-Aware KV Cache Compression for Long Reasoning
innovation_summary: Information-Aware KV Cache Compression for Long Reasoning: Based on the observation, we propose InfoKV, an entropy-aware KV cache compression framework that incorporates information-theoretic signals.
